description: Use this API to set a three-winding transformer to out-of-service during dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = dist_3wind_trip(ibus, jbus, kbus, id)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the other buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Bus number of the third bus. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: STRT or MSTR has not been successfully executed.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
